transcript.text:
This is the rosé fried chicken
Please hurry
Thank you
Side dishes?
Yes, sauce Thank you
Hello everyone
I'm at a chicken restaurant today
Rosé is pretty hyped right now
Dishes like rosé tteokboki, rosé braised chicken, etc
They came out with rosé fried chicken
The owner invited me to enjoy the food as much as I wanted, so here I am
[Pull]
Here's the rosé fried chicken
There's rosé for everything these days
There's the rosé tteokboki (spicy rice cake)
Let's order it all

Hello
[Nervous]
I can really order whatever I want?
I, no. WE will take care of it
Rosé fried chicken, red queen combo,
Cheese cube boneless chicken,
Rosé tteokboki with a lot of fěnhàozi (glass noodles)
Can I have lots of sauce too?
Yes, of course
Also, cream cheese balls and shrimp rings, please
Our real rosé tteokboki...
sauce... real...
Real rosé sauce...
Our real rosé sauce is really delicious
The sauce complements the chicken really well
[Satisfied]

Understood I'll do that
I'm so hungry I want to eat
Hurry please
Thank you
Side dish?
Yes, sauce Thank you
I should've ordered more
Everything is here
Rosé fried chicken,
This is the cheese cube boneless chicken
Red queen chicken,
Tteokboki and the sauce
Cheese ball and shrimp ring too
This is a dine-in only menu because the sauce can cause the fried chicken to get soggy
But can't you just eat the rosé tteokboki with the boneless chicken?
Let's pour the sauce on here

Today's just rosé explosion
That smells good
I wonder if this will taste good
I think it will go well with the boneless chicken
Bon appetit
Where do I start?
Let's eat the rosé fried chicken first since it came out first
First time trying rosé fried chicken
Fresh-fried chicken is crispy and tasty
That sound
That's the tasty fried chicken batter
The sauce is amazing
To me, all of the rosé sauce out in the market nowadays taste very artificial
But this isn't like that
This has a strong rosé taste
The batter is good

Thin, crispy, and juicy
This will go quickly
Tteokboki this time
Filled with fěnhàozi
Is the sauce different?
This is really good too
I think one of the best rosé tteokboki I ever had
I need to try this dish
Let's try it without the sauce
It's really nicely fried
[Rosé sauce re-fill] Thank you
It's okay
Let's just soak this in here
Let's put everything
Tastes good together
Cheese ball too

This sauce goes well with all fried foods
Rosé rice chicken
This..
The sauce goes really well with the boneless chicken
So I was thinking if the cheese cube will taste good too
And it's yummy
This..
Surprised me on the first bite
The more you eat, the better it gets for this one
I ordered this just in case it gets too cheesy
I thought it was a spicy dish
But it's just a spicy cream
Maybe like rosé?
It has that strong Cheongyang pepper taste
Here's the cubed cheese
Cheddar cheese?

Cheddar cubed cheese
I feel like this rosé sauce can go well with anything
Even this too?
It's good
I refuse to try it with the pickled radish
This is just a universal sauce
It's my first time wearing it after buying it
And this happens
Oh no
I said it goes well with anything I guess even on my sweater
This tastes good with this too
So cool
There wasn't anything like this when I was younger
Even if there was, I wouldn't have been able to eat it
I remember coming home to a half box of fried chicken
I cried and left the house

I yelled, "I'm leaving this house!" and left
Chicken, rice cake, chicken, rice cake
There
All in 1 bite?
Let's eat the drumstick
I always find myself going for the boneless over the traditional
I just like boneless too much
I've gotten too lazy to pick out the bones since I eat a big amount
Maybe I should've only ordered boneless
This does neutralize the cheesiness
But I'm not good at eating spicy food
I need to eat something else after eating this
It's good but it's spicy
It's rice cake!
I didn't know until now
That is delicious

It's a very thin rice cake
Almost like pasta
Thin rice cake
Since I like mustard leaf kimchi(?)
That's random
Since it can get too cheesy for you
Oh, thank you
Also, you don't need to finish the food if it's too spicy
Thank you
Mustard leaf kimchi out of nowhere
Soggy fried chicken generally don't taste good
But I approve of this one because it's still good
I thought too much rosé sauce will make everything too cheesy
It's a little salty,
How do I say this
It also has a kick to it, so it's not like that at all

I still don't know what the kimchi is for though
All of a sudden
It would've been nice if I can order this for delivery from my house
To eat rosé
Spicy
I forgot about this
Last piece
I think I ate my life-long worth of rosé sauce all in this meal
In the midst of the rosé hype, I would pick this rosé fried chicken as my top pick
Pouring the rosé tteokboki sauce over the boneless chicken made it taste similar
I like how you can enjoy the rice cake too
I enjoyed today's meal, but I could not finish the spicy one
I will to-go this one and another fried chicken to eat with my editor later
Thanks everyone~
I'm sorry, but I couldn't finish this one
I will package this.. deliciously(?)
I think our restaurant will become famous now
